title: Rewrite cfb.rs using native wc_AesCfbEncrypt/Decrypt
description: Replace the EVP-based cfb.rs implementation with native WcAes. Current state: AES_KEY struct + explicit iv:[u8;16] + num:c_int fields, initialized via AES_set_encrypt_key, operated via AES_cfb128_encrypt with AES_ENCRYPT/DECRYPT flag. New state: WcAes struct only (IV and partial-block counter managed internally). Use wc_AesInit + wc_AesSetKey(dir=AES_ENCRYPTION, always — CFB only uses forward AES schedule) in KeyIvInit. Use wc_AesCfbEncrypt in Enc types, wc_AesCfbDecrypt in Dec types (separate because CFB is asymmetric). Call wc_AesFree in Drop. Remove iv and num fields. Template: wolfcrypt/src/cipher/ofb.rs uses exact same WcAes pattern. Keep same six concrete types: Aes128/192/256 CfbEnc/Dec. Aes192 stays gated on wolfssl_aes_192. Check error codes from wc_AesCfbEncrypt/Decrypt (return c_int, 0=success).
